configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Debug build for the edit-compile-test loop. Skips the LLVM optimizer (backend ~= 65% of -O2 time). Demos/tests are EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL: build a single target, e.g. `cmake --build build/dev --target finite-volume-advection-2d`.

configurePresets.name: dev-fast
configurePresets.description: Fastest possible compile: -O0 and no -g. Use when you don't need a debugger; trims frontend memory and link time vs dev.

configurePresets.name: relwithdebinfo
configurePresets.description: Optimized build with debug info. Slow to compile (full LLVM backend) but debuggable and fast at runtime.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Fully optimized. Slowest to compile; use for benchmarks and production runs.
